name: lexscholar
description: LexScholar monorepo — web app and desktop (Tauri v2) app with AI lecture transcription

scripts.web:install: cd web && npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.desktop:dev: cd desktop && npm run tauri dev
scripts.desktop:build: cd desktop && npm run tauri build
scripts.mobile:sync: cd mobile && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:open: cd mobile && npx cap open android
scripts.install:all: npm run web:install && npm run desktop:install && npm run mobile:install
